root.sql:
SELECT sc_rep_level_det.level_date, sc_rep_level_det.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_rep_level_det.balance_begin, sc_rep_level_det.pay_prin, sc_rep_level_det.pay_int, --sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.first_period as period_payment_amount, sc_rep_level_det.balance_forward, sc_rep_level_det.loan_contract_no,
sc_rep_level_det.last_access_date, sc_rep_level_det.last_calint_date, sc_rep_level_det.int_arrear, sc_rep_level_det.period_law, sc_rep_level_det.period_real, sc_rep_level_det.period_miss, sc_rep_level_det.amount_law, sc_rep_level_det.amount_real, sc_rep_level_det.amount_miss, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc, sc_rep_level_ucf.level_status, sc_rep_level_ucf.level_desc, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_rep_level_det.membership_no ) as membername, sc_rep_level_head.member_group_no, sc_rep_level_det.principal_arr
FROM sc_rep_level_det, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code, sc_rep_level_ucf, sc_rep_level_head
WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_rep_level_det.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_rep_level_det.loan_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code ) and ( sc_rep_level_det.level_status_in_year = sc_rep_level_ucf.level_status ) and ( sc_rep_level_head.level_date = sc_rep_level_det.level_date ) and ( sc_rep_level_head.membership_no = sc_rep_level_det.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_rep_level_head.member_group_no ) /*WHERE*/ and sc_rep_level_det.amount_miss > 0
order by sc_rep_level_ucf.level_status ,sc_rep_level_head.member_group_no ,sc_rep_level_head.membership_no ,sc_rep_level_det.balance_forward desc
